definitions.text: Equally distant from one another at all points.
examples: The horizontal lines on my notebook paper are parallel.

definitions.text: Having the same overall direction; the comparison is indicated with "to".
examples: The two railway lines are parallel.
The road runs parallel to the canal.

definitions.text: One of a set of parallel lines.
Direction conformable to that of another line.
To construct or place something parallel to something else.
Of a path etc: To be parallel to something else.
Of a process etc: To be analogous to something else.
